case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MANUEL DE JESUS MAGANA ULUAC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $343.27 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT ULUAC, MANUEL DE JESUS MAGANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
